justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted all of the user's temporal preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the user's preferred times were unavailable, offering two close options in each instance.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was efficient, avoiding redundant questions and unnecessary turns, though it did make multiple check_availability calls in some turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The agent maintained a professional and helpful tone, providing a generally smooth experience despite the repeated unavailability of preferred slots.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent consistently maintained context and offered relevant alternatives after each rejection, demonstrating excellent recovery quality.
